company_type: Alternative Asset Management and Retirement Services

dependencies: Reliance on third-party vendors for hosting information systems and hardware systems
Dependence on third-party service providers for certain aspects of business including information systems, technology and administration
Reliance on third-party intermediaries to sell retirement services products
Dependence on third-party administrators to administer annuity contracts and legacy life insurance business
risks: Supply chain disruptions affecting portfolio companies globally
Cybersecurity threats from third-party vendors and service providers
Concentration risk with third-party vendors for critical business systems
Vendor security breaches limiting response capabilities
Limited ability to monitor third-party suppliers' information security practices

Counterparty credit risk from derivative transactions, reinsurance counterparty risk, reliance on third-party pricing services for investment valuations, concentration risk in certain investments and reinsurers
